name: The Patient Majority
specialty: Specializing in covert operations and manipulation, The Patient Majority are renowned for their ability to infiltrate even the most secure locations without raising suspicion.

members.name: Elysia Stonehollow
members.note: Her quiet demeanor and piercing gaze make her a formidable negotiator, often leaving adversaries questioning their own decisions.

members.name: Varn Orreth
members.note: Despite his missing left arm, Varn's keen senses and impressive tracking skills make him an invaluable member of the team.

visual: Elysia and Varn often wear plain, dark attire that blends with the city's shadows. Elysia's long, wavy hair is a stark contrast to her otherwise somber appearance, while Varn's heavily scarred face is a constant reminder of his past battles.
reputation_note: Whispers in the Undercity suggest that The Patient Majority are ex-members of the Iron Fang Consortium, now operating on their own terms. A word of caution is given to those who cross their path.
